name: multiai-answer-cx
description: Multi-AI voting answer assistant for Chaoxing (学习通) - TypeScript rewrite

scripts.package: npm run build && rm -rf release && mkdir -p release/MultiAI-Answer/src/popup release/MultiAI-Answer/src/content/utils && cp manifest.json release/MultiAI-Answer/ && cp -r icons lib dist release/MultiAI-Answer/ && cp src/popup/popup.html src/popup/popup.js release/MultiAI-Answer/src/popup/ && cp src/content/utils/notification.js release/MultiAI-Answer/src/content/utils/ && cd release && zip -r MultiAI-Answer.zip MultiAI-Answer && rm -rf MultiAI-Answer && echo 'Packaged: release/MultiAI-Answer.zip'
